message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 93.1 (2020)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13683","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer with cross‑national samples for all listed EU member states in 2020; contains modules on political behaviour and attitudes, political trust, EU institutions, democracy, and international politics, making it directly relevant to politics, conflict/security perceptions, and political ideology in the 2020s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 94.3 (2020)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13716","justification":"Conducted in 2020 across EU member states including all requested countries; includes items on political attitudes, trust in EU and national institutions, and views on international cooperation and policy, fitting the topics of international politics and political behaviour in the 2020s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 95.1 (2021)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13765","justification":"2021 wave covering almost all EU‑27 countries listed; focuses on political attitudes toward EU, democracy, and policy priorities, with indicators of ideology and political behaviour, relevant to political behaviour and international politics in the 2020s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 96.1 (2021)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13805","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer fielded in 2021 in EU countries including the specified list; covers political trust, evaluations of EU institutions, and political orientations, linking to political behaviour and ideology in the 2020s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 97.4 (2022)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14021","justification":"2022 cross‑national survey in EU member states; includes questions on political attitudes, EU policies, and reactions to international events (including security‑related issues), relevant to conflict, security and peace and broader international politics."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 98.1 (2022)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14064","justification":"Covers EU‑27 including the requested countries; focuses on citizens’ political attitudes, trust in EU and national politics, and positions on European and global challenges, thus fitting political behaviour and international politics in the 2020s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 99.1 (2023)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14222","justification":"2023 Eurobarometer wave with all listed EU states; covers political trust, satisfaction with democracy, attitudes to EU and international issues such as security and global challenges, directly addressing international politics and political behaviour."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 100.1 (2023)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14306","justification":"Conducted in 2023 in EU‑27 countries; includes measures of political engagement, ideology, views on international cooperation and security, and evaluations of EU institutions, aligning with the domains of politics, conflict/security, and political ideology."},{"title":"European Election Study 2019 – Voter Study, GESIS Long-Term Preservation and Access Version (fieldwork extending into 2020 for some components)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13889","justification":"Pan‑European dataset including many of the requested countries, focused on political behaviour, party choice, and ideology around the European Parliament elections; although anchored in 2019, it includes late fieldwork and follow‑ups into 2020 and extensive political ideology and behaviour measures relevant for early 2020s analyses."},{"title":"European Values Study 2017–2021, Integrated Dataset (EVS)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14140","justification":"Cross‑national survey including Belgium, Bulgaria, Czech Republic, Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Italy, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Sweden and others, with fieldwork extending into the early 2020s; rich on political values, ideology, trust in institutions, and attitudes toward international organisations and peace/security issues."}]}
